runs.content:
**Investigation idea:** The 2026-07-11 Games-prototype idea had a wrong premise — raw/games/ does exist, but only 2 of the 4 claimed stubs are real files. That earlier entry stated raw/games/ 'doesn't currently exist as a folder.' It does: raw/games/Mobile Wood Chopping Game.md and raw/games/Childrens Financial Literacy Game.md (both created 2026-05-01, each recording a distinct Claude project UUID) are real, readable stub pages. But memory/index.md's Domain Content Status names four prototypes — those two, plus 'Crypto Portfolio Tracker' and 'Project Planning Interface' — and the latter two have no corresponding file anywhere in raw/games/ or wiki/games/; they exist only as a single line in a memory file. games/prototypes.md's table is still 100% '[to be added]' regardless. Next step: ask Fred whether Crypto Portfolio Tracker and Project Planning Interface are real, separate Claude projects that still need raw stub files created, or whether the memory note is simply stale — and either way, populate games/prototypes.md's table now with at least the two confirmed prototypes.

**Cross-domain connection:** Games' own raw stub for the Children's Financial Literacy Game already spells out a Finance + Lightfin crossover — a genuine 3-domain link sitting nowhere else in the wiki. raw/games/Childrens Financial Literacy Game.md (created 2026-05-01) has a dedicated 'Cross-Domain Notes' section explicitly naming a Finance link (financial literacy concepts, compound interest, budgeting) and a Lightfin link (possible Lightfin-universe skinning — underwater economy, coral coins, etc.), plus an open todo asking to sketch out a Lightfin-universe financial literacy game. This is exactly the kind of synthesis this task looks for — but it's written down only in a raw, pre-ingestion stub: games/prototypes.md's table is still the placeholder row, games/overview.md doesn't mention it, and neither Finance - overview nor any Lightfin page (lightfin/adaptation-overview, lightfin/characters) references a financial-literacy game concept at all. Next step: once formally ingested into games/prototypes.md, add reverse links from Finance - overview and lightfin/adaptation-overview.

**Cross-domain connection:** Abbott's diagnostics franchise — a stock Fred just took a live position in — is the literal product category Health's own biomarker-tracking stub is missing. finance/paper-trading-vol/trades/2026-07-17-ABT.md opened a Portfolio 2 volume-spike trade in Abbott Laboratories (ABT) on 2026-07-17; the trade's own 5-point thesis cites Abbott's 'diversified healthcare/diagnostics/device franchise' (medical devices, diagnostics, nutrition, pharma) as one reason for entry. Meanwhile health/my-protocol.md's 'Biomarkers Being Tracked' table has read 100% '[to be added]' since 2026-05-01, and health/overview.md's Focus Areas still lists 'Biomarkers — what to track and why' as unbuilt. Abbott's actual consumer diagnostics line (continuous glucose monitors, at-home testing) is a plausible real-world source for the tracking tools Fred's own protocol stub needs — an investment thesis and a personal-health gap now point at the same company, with no cross-reference between the trade page and Health at all.

Quiet day overall (Saturday full-sweep run, biased toward connections per schedule) — no new investigation ideas surfaced that weren't already open in prior runs.
